answer: September 15, 2026 Florida escrow disbursement reconciliation incident in which `settlement_disbursement_recon_v3` used `normalized_tax_id` instead of `closing_party_role_id`; the fix is to switch to the correct join key and backfill the affected Florida purchase closings.

facts.remediation: Switch the transform to `closing_party_role_id`, quarantine `normalized_tax_id` joins in reconciliation workloads, and backfill Florida purchase closings for FNF National Title.
facts.root_cause: `settlement_disbursement_recon_v3` joined `party.party_identity_bridge` on `normalized_tax_id` instead of `closing_party_role_id`, which duplicated escrow disbursements at the wrong grain.
